---
name: Specification bug
about: Report an error, ambiguity, or inconsistency in the spec, schemas, or examples
title: "<short description>"
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Where

- [ ] `spec/feedpak-v1.md` (section: ____)
- [ ] `schemas/` (file: ____)
- [ ] `examples/`
- [ ] `tools/validate.py`
- [ ] Other: ____

## What's wrong

Describe the error, ambiguity, or contradiction. Quote the exact text if it helps.

## Expected / suggested fix

What the correct or clearer wording or behaviour should be.

## Impact

Does this affect what a conformant reader or writer must do, or is it editorial only?
